title: Myneheroes
description: This is a heroes mod aiming to create a more customizable feel. This is currently a proof of concept and not everything is fully worked out.
body:
# Myneheroes. 
Myneheroes is a superheroes mod Aiming to enable players to combine looks with function by allowing them to: dye the armor differend colors, and have powers not dependent on what they wear.

## Discord
Join [the discord](https://discord.gg/SU2rPNjVgx) for sneak-peaks and announcements. If you have any questions, encounter bugs or want to suggest your own idea. The discord has a place for all that. Join the community


## Geckolib
the mod is made with geckolib in mind. Using this mod will make the armor look much nicer by having another model and a shiny texture. This mod will run without geckolib, for the people who don't like long list of mods and don't mind the vanilla look of the armor. It is possible to install geckolib on a world you already made without changing any items or other data from this mod. removing geckolib should also work the same.

## Items
### Some implemented items are:

### JEI
for a full list of all the items we recommend installing JEI. this will also help with recipes.

## Blocks

- Armor Dyeing Station
- Armor Light Leveling Station
- Meteor Radar
- Armor Fabricator
- Upgrade Station

## Armor

- Titanium
- Gold Titanium
- Vibranium
## Advanced armor
Advanced armor can be upgraded using upgrades by the upgrade station. Some upgrades require another item or can work together with other armor pieces 

- Mark6 - Vibranium
- Mark3 - Gold Titanium
- Mark45 - Netherite
- Speedster - Vibranium
- Speedster - Gold Titanium
- Speedster - Netherite

## Powers
currently there are only 4 superpowers. Each power can be given or removed from a player using the 'power' command.

- Kryptonian
  - obtained by being near a BLOCK of kryptonite without being exposed to sunlight. 
exelerated by the amount of kryptonite based blocks touching that block. !!Does not work when moving to another block you have to stay around one given block for it to count!!

- Speedster
  - obtained by being struck by lightning while having the speed effect.
 
- Spider (organic webbing)
  - obtained by: milking a spider for it's venom, mixing that venom with uranium and drinking the mixture.
  - doing this while having the weaving effect will result to getting organic webbing

- Mutant regeneration (Wolverine)
  - currently only available using commands
